main_tracks.name: Agent Orchestration
main_tracks.description: Subagents, parallel execution, model routing, and tool composition.

main_tracks.name: Autonomous Cloud
main_tracks.description: Long-running agents, background workflows, PR loops, and reliability at scale.

main_tracks.name: DevEx + JIT Tools
main_tracks.description: Context-aware developer UX, proactive assistants, and high-leverage workflow tools.

main_tracks.name: Verification + Trace
main_tracks.description: Observability, evals, provenance, safety checks, and anti-hallucination systems.

side_challenges.name: Golden Buzzer
side_challenges.description: Standout wow-factor project selected by judges.

side_challenges.name: Zero Manual Run
side_challenges.description: End-to-end build/test loop with near-zero manual edits.

side_challenges.name: Best Newcomer Team
side_challenges.description: Best submission from first-time hackathon participants.

organizer_learnings: Team size: 1-4 builders. Require individual registration for fair credit assignment.
Best event length for this format: around 3 hours of build time plus demos.
Demo format: strict 3-5 minute cap per team with AV check before presentations.
For larger cohorts, shortlist using pairwise comparisons to reduce judge bias.
Use a Golden Buzzer mechanic for exceptional outlier projects.
Setup support is critical; pair beginners with experienced builders early.

judging_format.suggested_shortlisting: Pairwise comparison for large volumes; golden buzzer for standout projects.
